steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Hew out is used figuratively to describe attempts by individuals at a gathering to express their ideas about art.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
B captures the idea of cutting or carving away to reveal a definition, aligning with attempting to clarify an artistic conception. A, C, and D either suggest visualization, agreement, or limitation which do not fit the passage’s intent —
'That matches choice B — B is correct.'
